title: One honest conversation changes more than years of silence
caption:
Most men are carrying something no one around them knows about.

Not because the people aren’t there. Because you’ve gotten good at keeping it manageable.

God designed you to be known. James 5:16 isn’t a suggestion. It’s a design. Find one man and say the thing you’ve been managing.

#brotherhood #accountability #faith #christianmen #menoffaith #godlymen #confession #realmen
